input_text: Hi Mom, this is my new number. My phone broke and I need you to Zelle me $450 right now for an emergency.
rationale: A claimed family member on a new number is requesting an urgent money transfer.

input_text: It's me, Dad. I lost my phone. Please send money by Cash App and do not tell anyone until I get home.
rationale: Family impersonation, payment, and secrecy are high-risk social-engineering signals.

input_text: This is your son. I have a new phone and need a $300 gift card immediately. Please help me.
rationale: A family identity claim combined with a new phone and gift-card demand requires stopping.

input_text: Hi Grandma, it's me, Mom. My phone is broken. Can you Venmo me $600 today? I am stranded.
rationale: The message impersonates family and asks for an immediate transfer.

input_text: It's me, Grandpa. I lost my phone and need you to wire transfer money for a hospital bill now.
rationale: Family impersonation plus an urgent wire transfer is a classic emergency scam.

input_text: This is your daughter. New phone. Please Zelle me $250 right now and keep this between us.
rationale: New-number family impersonation with money and secrecy should never be treated as low risk.

input_text: Send me the verification code now so I can secure your bank account.
rationale: No legitimate caller should ask the user to share a one-time verification code.

input_text: I sent you a code. Read the 6-digit passcode back to me immediately.
rationale: The sender directly requests a passcode and creates urgency.

input_text: Your PayPal refund is pending. Give me the code that just arrived on your phone.
rationale: A financial impersonator is asking for a security code.

input_text: IT support here. Please send me the OTP so we can restore your email access.
rationale: An OTP request under an IT-support pretext is credential theft.

input_text: Enter this code for me or your account will be locked today: 483921.
rationale: The request combines a code action with an account-lock threat.

input_text: Bank security department: tell us your PIN and the verification code to stop a transfer.
rationale: Requests for a PIN and verification code are explicit credential theft.

input_text: ALERT: Your Chase account has been suspended. Verify your login immediately at http://chase-verify-now.tk/login
rationale: A suspended-account threat, credential language, and suspicious link require stopping.

input_text: Wells Fargo security alert: your account will be locked. Confirm your identity at https://wells-security.xyz/login now.
rationale: Bank impersonation, lockout pressure, login request, and a suspicious domain are high risk.

input_text: Bank of America: unusual activity detected. Click here immediately to verify your account password.
rationale: A bank-branded message asks for a password through an urgent action link.

input_text: Capital One final notice: login at http://capitalone-review.ml/login to prevent account suspension today.
rationale: The message uses bank impersonation, a suspicious login domain, and a deadline.

input_text: Citi fraud team: verify your credit card and CVV now at https://citi-fraud-check.top/secure
rationale: The sender requests card details and CVV through a suspicious financial link.

input_text: Your bank account is suspended. Tap here to confirm your username and password before the deadline.
rationale: Account suspension plus username and password collection is a critical phishing pattern.

input_text: FedEx: Your package is waiting for delivery preferences. Schedule delivery at https://fedex-delivery-update.com/track
rationale: A carrier message with an action link must be independently verified, not marked low risk.

input_text: USPS failed delivery. Update shipping details here: https://usps-redelivery.example/update
rationale: A failed-delivery action link should route the user to official-channel verification.

input_text: DHL parcel held at customs. Confirm delivery at https://dhl-customs.example/confirm
rationale: Parcel and customs context with a link requires verification through DHL directly.

input_text: UPS: reschedule delivery using this link https://ups-reschedule.example/parcel
rationale: A rescheduling link in an unsolicited carrier message should be verified independently.

input_text: Your package delivery failed. Pay a $2.99 redelivery fee immediately.
rationale: A package message demanding a redelivery payment triggers the STOP policy.

input_text: FedEx final notice: pay customs fee at https://fedex-fee.xyz/pay or the parcel will be returned today.
rationale: A carrier impersonator combines a fee demand, suspicious link, and deadline.

input_text: I cannot meet in person. Send a $200 security deposit by Zelle and my courier will deliver the item.
rationale: An off-platform deposit before delivery is a high-risk marketplace pattern.

input_text: The apartment is yours if you pay the holding fee today. I cannot meet in person.
rationale: A remote landlord asking for a holding fee before meeting triggers the advance-payment STOP policy.

input_text: Pay the reservation fee by Cash App now and I will mark the Marketplace listing as sold.
rationale: A reservation payment through an off-platform transfer service should be stopped.

input_text: I am interested in buying it, but first send money for the courier insurance fee.
rationale: A buyer asking the seller to prepay a courier fee is an advance-fee scam.

input_text: Send the deposit in bitcoin before viewing the car. My agent will arrange shipping.
rationale: Crypto deposit before inspection and agent shipping are strong fraud indicators.

input_text: The puppy can be shipped first after you pay a $150 deposit and shipping fee today.
rationale: Advance payment and shipping fees before receiving an item require stopping.

input_text: Your invoice is overdue. Click to view invoice at https://billing-portal.example/invoice/4821
rationale: An unsolicited overdue-invoice link should be checked through known vendor records.

input_text: Payment reminder: unpaid invoice 8842. Open this link to review the outstanding balance.
rationale: An invoice demand with an action link requires verification before opening or paying.

input_text: Final notice: attached invoice is overdue. Remit payment by wire transfer today.
rationale: An overdue invoice paired with an urgent wire-transfer demand is high risk.

input_text: QuickBooks invoice pending. Click here to pay invoice at https://quickbooks-pay.xyz/secure
rationale: A branded invoice payment link on a suspicious domain must be verified independently.

input_text: Dear customer, your unpaid invoice requires a processing fee. Pay the fee immediately.
rationale: A generic invoice message demanding an immediate fee should be stopped.

input_text: Outstanding balance on invoice 319. Visit https://vendor-billing.example/pay to review it.
rationale: An unknown invoice link is an action case and cannot receive low visible risk.

input_text: IRS final notice: claim your refund of $1,200 today at https://irs-refund.xyz/login
rationale: A government refund lure combines urgency, a suspicious login link, and a reward.

input_text: Congratulations, you qualify for a $1,400 stimulus payment. Click here now to claim it.
rationale: An unsolicited stimulus offer with an urgent action must be verified through an official site.

input_text: Social Security refund of $800 is waiting. Confirm your SSN at http://benefits-check.tk/login immediately.
rationale: The message requests an SSN through a suspicious refund login link.

input_text: Treasury relief payment selected for you. Visit https://relief-payment.example/claim before the deadline.
rationale: A selected relief payment and deadline link are suspicious and need official verification.

input_text: FTC compensation refund of $2,500 approved. Pay a processing fee to release it today.
rationale: An advance fee to release a government compensation payment is a classic scam.

input_text: Your tax refund is on hold. Verify your identity and password at https://tax-refund.top/secure now.
rationale: A tax-refund pretext is used to collect identity and password information.

input_text: Can you pick up milk on your way home?
rationale: A normal household request contains no link, payment, credential, urgency, or impersonation.

input_text: Are we still meeting for coffee at 3?
rationale: A casual scheduling question has no visible scam indicators.

input_text: The neighborhood meeting starts at 6 at the library.
rationale: An informational community message requests no sensitive action.

input_text: Thanks for dinner. I made it home safely.
rationale: A conversational thank-you message has no visible scam signals.

input_text: Please bring the blue folder to our appointment tomorrow.
rationale: A routine reminder contains no risky link or sensitive request.

input_text: Happy birthday! I hope you have a wonderful day.
rationale: A greeting with no requested action should remain low visible risk.

input_text: My love, I am stranded overseas and need you to send money for an emergency flight today.
rationale: A romantic contact is using an overseas emergency to demand an immediate transfer.

input_text: Darling, the hospital will not treat me until you wire transfer $900 right now. Please keep this private.
rationale: An urgent medical story, wire transfer, and secrecy are high-risk romance scam signals.

input_text: Sweetheart, my account is frozen. Can you Zelle me $500 immediately so I can get home?
rationale: A relationship pretext is paired with urgency and a direct payment request.

input_text: I cannot video call because I am deployed. Please send money for my daughter's emergency medicine today.
rationale: The sender avoids identity verification and requests emergency money under emotional pressure.

input_text: Baby, buy a $300 gift card now and send me the numbers. It is the only way to unlock my phone.
rationale: Gift-card payment and immediate pressure are characteristic irreversible-payment tactics.

input_text: I want to visit you, but customs is holding my luggage. Pay the customs fee today so I can leave.
rationale: A romantic travel story is being used to collect an urgent customs payment.

input_text: Security notice: verify your account at https://account-review.example.com before continuing.
rationale: The sender may be legitimate, but an account-verification link requires an independent channel.

input_text: A document is waiting for your review. Click here to open this link and approve it.
rationale: An unexplained document approval link should be verified before opening.

input_text: Your delivery preferences need attention. Visit https://delivery-center.example.com to confirm delivery.
rationale: A delivery action may be real, but the user should navigate to the carrier independently.

input_text: Payment reminder: an attached invoice needs review. Open this link to view the invoice.
rationale: An unexpected invoice action should be checked with the purported sender before opening.

input_text: Your bank has a security alert. Visit https://secure-message.example.com to review recent activity.
rationale: A bank-themed security link must be verified through the official app or saved phone number.

input_text: Please open this link to confirm the appointment details: https://appointments.example.com/review
rationale: The appointment may be genuine, but an unsolicited action link warrants verification.
